title: Office Order relating to appointment of Chairperson ,CCI
description: Office Order relating to appointment of Chairperson ,CCI
text: File No. Compo 05/1/2018.Comp MCA. GOVERNEMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS 5th Floor, " A" Wing, Shastri Bhavan, Dr. R.P. Road New Delhi-ll0001 Dated: 09.11.2018 Office Order Pursuant to the approval of the Appointments Conunittee of the Cabinet (ACC) vide order No. 18/40/2018-EO(SM.IJ) dated 09.11.2018, the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Ashok Kumar Gupta, lAS (TN: 1981) (Retd.) as the Chairperson in the Competition Commission of India (CCI) on a consolidated salary of Rs 4,50,000/ - per month (without house and car) from the date of assumption of charge of the post, until 25.10.2022 (i.e. the date on which he attains the age of 65 years), or until further orders, whichever is the earliest. ~yL~ (Rakesh Kumar) Under Secretary to the Government of India. Tel. 23387939 To Shri Ashok Kumar Gupta, lAS (Retd.). Flat No. 206, Maitri Apartment Plot No. 17, Sector 10 Dwarka New Delhi-l1007S. (~)sg"W2ta47@gmail.com) ~opy to:- 1. Prime Minister's Office (PMO), south Block, New Delhi. 2. Cabinet Secretariat, Rashtrapati Bhawan, New Delhi. 3. Secretary, Secretariat of the ACC DoPT, North Block, New Delhi with regard to their order No. 18/40/2018-EO(SM.II) dated 09.11.2018 4. All Ministries/Departments of the Government of India 1. rs to CAM/MoS 2. Sr. Pf'S to Secretary, Corporate Affairs 3. All other Officers/Sections in the MCA 4. CCI/NCLT /NCLAT /IBBI/SFIO/ICAl/ICoAIjICSI/IEPF Authority S. All RDs/ROCs/OLs 6. E-Governance Cell to place it on the MCA website 7. Guard File. -- 1 of 1 --
